response.justification: Despite a strong and diverse software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development experience on Windows platforms and has no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise — both mandatory requirements for this role. Their C++ exposure is limited to a brief academic/thesis project over a decade ago, and their professional work has been almost entirely in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and testing practices
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: No recent or professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Absence of any capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-performance trading environments
